methodology.disclaimer: This dashboard uses transparent heuristics inspired by common bank and sell-side screening practice. It is not an official S&P Dow Jones methodology and is not investment advice.
fallOutFactors: Lower market capitalization relative to current constituents.
Weak profit margins and return on equity.
Negative or slowing earnings and revenue growth.
Higher leverage and weaker balance-sheet support.
Reduced liquidity versus the current index cohort.
entryFactors: Larger market capitalization inside the candidate universe.
Positive profitability and return on equity.
Candidate set is sourced from current S&P 400, S&P 600, and Nasdaq-100 constituents outside the S&P 500.
valuationFactors: Sector-relative forward and trailing P/E comparisons.
Profitability, return on equity, and revenue growth as quality controls.
Debt profile to avoid purely low-quality cheap names.

sources.label: Finviz quote pages for fundamentals and dividend fields
